name: RippleBench Pro
description: 8 SWE-Pro-level tasks testing DeepSeek Code's ripple engine, Flash Triage, type-system reasoning, and web-search integration.
codebase: Type-safe Event Pipeline — 5 source files, complex generics, middleware chains, retry logic

tasks.title: Generic type parameter propagation through 5 files
tasks.description: Add a new generic type parameter `TMeta extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, never>` to `PipelineContext`, then propagate it through `Handler<T, TMeta>`, `Middleware<C, TMeta>`, `EventBus<TMeta>`, and `BatchProcessor<TMeta>`. The middleware `process` signature and `createMiddlewareChain` must be updated. All 5 source files compile with zero errors. The existing tests continue to pass with the default `TMeta` parameter.
tasks.rippleCheck: Every file that imports `PipelineContext`, `Handler`, `Middleware`, or `EventBus` must have its generic parameters updated

tasks.title: String union to discriminated union migration
tasks.description: Replace `EventType` (string union) and `EventPayload` (single shape) with 6 discriminated union variants: `UserCreatedEvent`, `UserUpdatedEvent`, `OrderPlacedEvent`, `OrderCancelledEvent`, `PaymentReceivedEvent`, `PaymentFailedEvent`. Each variant has a typed `payload` field. `Handler` must use the discriminated union so that `event.payload` is narrowed in each handler. All existing tests still pass. The `createValidateMiddleware` should validate against the new type.
tasks.rippleCheck: EventBus.emit(), Handler signature, validate middleware — all must narrow to the new discriminated union

tasks.title: Async handler migration — sync to Promise
tasks.description: Change `Handler<T>` to return `Promise<T | null>` (async). This forces ALL call sites to add `await`: `EventBus.emit()` returns `Promise<EventPayload[]>`, `BatchProcessor.processOne()` must `await handler()`, `createMiddlewareChain` must accept async handlers, middleware `next()` returns `Promise<EventPayload | null>`. Tests must `await bus.emit()` and handle the async chain.
tasks.rippleCheck: Every caller of `Handler`, `EventBus.emit()`, and `createMiddlewareChain` must be updated with `await`. Ripple must detect async-return-change for Handler.

tasks.title: RetryPolicy interface refactor with backoff strategies
tasks.description: Replace `RetryPolicy`'s flat `maxRetries` + `backoffMs` fields with a `RetryStrategy` interface: `interface RetryStrategy { getDelay(attempt: number): number; shouldRetry(event: EventPayload, attempt: number, error: Error): boolean }`. Provide two implementations: `ConstantBackoff(ms)` and `ExponentialBackoff(baseMs, maxMs)`. Update `RetryPolicy` to use `RetryStrategy`. Update `BatchProcessor` to use the strategy interface. `DEFAULT_RETRY` becomes `ConstantBackoff(100)`. All consumers of `RetryPolicy` must be updated.
tasks.rippleCheck: Every import of `RetryPolicy.maxRetries` or `RetryPolicy.backoffMs` must be replaced with strategy calls.

tasks.title: Extract shared pipeline executor from EventBus and BatchProcessor
tasks.description: `EventBus.emit()` and `BatchProcessor.processOne()` both contain duplicate inline logic for: middleware chain construction, context creation, error wrapping. Extract a `PipelineExecutor` class that encapsulates: context creation, middleware chain execution, error handling. Refactor both `EventBus` and `BatchProcessor` to use `PipelineExecutor`. The public API of both classes must not change. All existing tests pass unchanged.
tasks.rippleCheck: EventBus and BatchProcessor must delegate to PipelineExecutor. Ripple should detect that the new file is imported correctly by both consumers.

tasks.title: Pluggable ErrorStrategy protocol
tasks.description: Replace `defaultErrorHandler` (a standalone function) with a proper `ErrorStrategy` interface: `interface ErrorStrategy { handleError(entry: ErrorEntry): ErrorAction; onDeadLetter(event: EventPayload): void }`. Provide two implementations: `RetryThenDLQ(maxRetries)` and `FailFast`. Inject `ErrorStrategy` into `EventBus` and `BatchProcessor` via constructor. The `ErrorStrategy` must be optional (default to `RetryThenDLQ(3)`). Remove `defaultErrorHandler` from the barrel export.
tasks.rippleCheck: Every call to `defaultErrorHandler()` must be replaced with `errorStrategy.handleError()`. Ripple must detect the removed export.

tasks.title: BREAKING: Delete EventBus.emit() without updating callers
tasks.description: Delete the `EventBus.emit()` method. Do NOT update any callers. The agent should either: (a) refuse to delete it, citing the callers, or (b) cascade-update all callers before deletion. If the agent deletes `emit()` without updating callers, the test fails (tsc error).
tasks.rippleCheck: Ripple MUST block this change — `emit()` is called in tests/event-pipeline.test.ts (5 callers) and is a public API method.
tasks.verification: tsc --noEmit (must pass — meaning ripple blocked the deletion OR all callers were updated)

tasks.title: BREAKING: Change Handler contravariance without consumer updates
tasks.description: Change `Handler<T>` from `(event: T, ctx: PipelineContext) => T | null` to `(ctx: PipelineContext, event: T) => T | null` — swapping parameter order. This is a signature change that breaks every handler in the codebase. Do NOT update any handler implementations. Ripple MUST detect the signature change and block. If it doesn't, tsc will report 10+ errors.
tasks.rippleCheck: Every handler function uses (event, ctx) parameter order. Swapping to (ctx, event) breaks all of them. Ripple must detect signature-change and block.
tasks.verification: If ripple blocked → tests still pass with original code. If ripple didn't block → tsc errors.

tasks.title: WEB SEARCH: Migrate to Bun.test v2 API
tasks.searchHint: Bun test describe expect API changes 2025 2026 latest version
tasks.description: The test file uses Bun test API (`describe`, `test`, `expect`). Search the web for the latest Bun test API changes (2025-2026). If Bun has introduced a new test runner API or changed the imports, update the test file accordingly. The task codebase currently imports from 'bun:test'. Verify by running `bun test tests/` — all 11 tests must pass with the updated API.

tasks.title: WEB SEARCH: Add exponential backoff with jitter from production practices
tasks.searchHint: exponential backoff jitter best practices AWS Google Cloud retry strategy
tasks.description: The current `BatchProcessor` uses simple linear backoff (`backoffMs * attempt`). Search the web for production retry best practices (AWS, Google Cloud, Stripe engineering blogs). Implement a jittered exponential backoff strategy based on industry standards. The new strategy must be the DEFAULT. Update `RetryPolicy` and `BatchProcessor` accordingly. Existing tests must pass. Add a new test verifying the backoff timing characteristics.
tasks.rippleCheck: RetryPolicy changes must propagate to BatchProcessor and any tests that hardcode maxRetries/backoffMs.
